assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: Response specifically mentions validating on Rapid channel dev clusters first before prod upgrade, clearly distinguishing between the two environments

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Includes dedicated 'Autopilot-Specific Considerations' section mentioning no manual node management and emphasizes workload-level validation, plus mentions resource requests/limits validation

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Specifically includes 'kubectl api-resources --deprecated=true' command for auditing deprecated APIs

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Includes verification of resource requests/limits in application readiness section and mentions automatic resource optimization in Autopilot considerations

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Includes PodDisruptionBudgets configuration check and readiness/liveness probes validation in the application readiness section

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Includes specific commands like 'kubectl version', 'gcloud container clusters list', and 'kubectl get nodes' for version verification

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Comprehensive workload health assessment section with pod status checks, service accessibility, endpoint testing, and performance validation

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: First item in pre-upgrade checklist explicitly recommends ensuring Rapid channel dev clusters are running 1.32+ successfully before prod upgrade

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: Does not mention the GKE release schedule or the ~1 month advance notice timeline - only acknowledges the upgrade is happening 'next month'
Comprehensive monitoring sections in both pre and post-upgrade checklists, including metrics monitoring, alerting setup, dashboards, and log aggregation

assertions.expectation: Does NOT proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions for Autopilot unless the customer explicitly asks for node upgrade control
assertions.reason: Correctly avoids mentioning node-level maintenance exclusions and focuses on workload-level concerns appropriate for Autopilot
